stemHtml:
The following data applies to a planned flight.

Dry Operating Mass: 34 900 kg
Performance Limited Take-Off Mass: 66 300 kg
Performance Limited Landing Mass: 55 200 kg
Maximum Zero Fuel Mass: 53 070 kg
Taxi Fuel: 400 kg
Trip Fuel: 8600 kg
Contingency Fuel: 430 kg
Alternate Fuel: 970 kg
Final Reserve Fuel: 900 kg
Traffic Load: 16 600 kg

Fuel costs at the departure airfield are such that it is decided to load the maximum fuel quantity possible. The total fuel (ramp fuel) which may be safely loaded prior to departure is…
